win_condition: Fulfill your role-specific victory condition (oath, vision, or citizenship) by end of round 5-8

categories.label: Chancellor Oath
categories.description: Chancellor wins by holding the oath condition at end of rounds 5-8

categories.label: Exile Vision
categories.description: Exile wins by fulfilling a played vision card's condition at end of round

categories.label: Citizen Shared Victory
categories.description: Citizens win if the Chancellor wins
